site.title: Riccardo Bozzato

site.description: Senior Delivery Manager & Head of Operations (PMP®). I make digital teams faster, less chaotic, and more predictable. Process design, team leadership, eCommerce/PIM-DAM delivery, AI-enabled operations. €500K+ delivered, teams of 8-12, 25-40% efficiency gains.

home.heroTitle: Operations, delivery, and execution. With a builder mindset.
home.heroRole: No chaos. Just processes that work.
home.heroTagline: Senior Delivery Manager & Head of Operations (PMP®). I build the systems — processes, KPIs, team structure — that let digital companies grow without breaking. €500K+ delivered across enterprise and startup environments, teams of 8-12, 40% faster time-to-market.
home.aboutTitle: From retail to the control room.
home.aboutText: 7+ years in operations. Started in retail (In's Mercato, Aldi), moved to Accenture (process automation, +30% efficiency), then Esse Solutions (€500K portfolio, teams of 8-12, Agile). Head of Operations at Ciao Elsa (2026). PMP® certified. Now I help digital teams scale without imploding.
home.freebieDesc: A 3-hour framework to map, measure, and prioritize operational debt — before it becomes a crisis.
home.servicesSubtitle: Four ways to bring order to your operations.

serviceList.title: Delivery & Process Design
serviceList.desc: Agile, Scrum, Kanban — but tailored to your team, not copied from a textbook. Release planning, capacity management, risk mitigation for teams of 8-12. 20-40% faster time-to-market.

serviceList.title: eCommerce & PIM-DAM Operations
serviceList.desc: Pimcore, Magento, Shopware — I've implemented them all. Enterprise integrations, platform migrations, data governance. 40% faster time-to-market on PIM projects.

serviceList.title: AI-Assisted Operations
serviceList.desc: Automate the boring stuff. Real-time KPI dashboards, centralized knowledge bases, AI workflows that actually work. Typical result: 10-40 hours/week recovered.

serviceList.title: Fractional Head of Ops / Delivery
serviceList.desc: For startups that aren't ready for a full-time Head of Operations — but need one anyway. Interim or part-time. I build the system, train your team, and hand over the keys.

projects.title: Case Studies
projects.subtitle: Real projects, real problems, real solutions. Lessons included.

panificio.title: Panificio Da Sergio
panificio.subtitle: Stakeholder Delivery: E-Commerce for a Family Bakery
panificio.description: Delivered a full e-commerce platform for a traditional Italian bakery — managing stakeholder expectations, technical constraints, and a tight budget. A lesson in scope negotiation, client communication, and shipping under real-world constraints.
features: Stakeholder management: translating family needs into technical requirements
Budget-constrained delivery: full e-commerce under material constraints
End-to-end: product catalog → orders → admin dashboard

vulnclaw.title: VulnClaw
vulnclaw.subtitle: Product Delivery: AI CLI from Zero to Open Source Community
vulnclaw.description: Built an open-source AI penetration testing CLI from scratch. Managed scope, community contributions, roadmap prioritization, and shipping a v0.4.0 with active users. Key lesson: starting narrow beats building broad every time.
features: Product scoping: from port scanner to full AI agent in 6 months
Community management: triaging PRs, issues, and feature requests
Roadmap prioritization: saying "no" to good ideas to ship the essential ones
Open source as a delivery strategy

trova.title: Trova
trova.subtitle: SaaS Product: From Idea to €49 Paid Product
trova.description: Designed, built, and shipped a production-ready SaaS boilerplate (Next.js 16, Stripe, Auth, i18n) as a paid product. Managing the full delivery lifecycle: requirements, scope control, payments, documentation, and support.
features: Full product lifecycle management: concept → build → ship → support
Scope control: 12-month project compressed to 8 with ruthless prioritization
Payment integration: Stripe billing, webhooks, idempotency, failure recovery
Internationalization: i18n baked into architecture from day one
Documentation as delivery: setup guides, API refs, migration docs

services.title: Operations & Delivery — Measurable Results
services.subtitle: Fixed price. Delivered.
services.heroDesc: You have an operations problem. Maybe your team is growing faster than your processes. Maybe you're firefighting instead of building. I design and implement the systems — process workflows, KPI frameworks, team structures — that fix it. PMP® certified, €500K+ delivered, teams of 8-12.

packages.title: Delivery & Process Design
packages.desc: Stop firefighting. I'll help you set up the planning, capacity, and risk frameworks that let your team ship predictably. No Agile theater — just the practices that actually work for your team size.

packages.title: eCommerce & PIM-DAM Operations
packages.desc: Pimcore, Magento, Shopware — enterprise implementations, integrations, data governance. 20-40% faster time-to-market.

packages.title: AI-Assisted Operations
packages.desc: Operational workflow automation, real-time KPI dashboards, centralized knowledge management. Recover 10-40 hours/week.

packages.title: Fractional Head of Ops / Delivery
packages.desc: Interim or part-time for early-stage startups. I build the operational architecture, train the team, leave a working system.

steps.desc: I spend the first week inside your operations — talking to your team, mapping your workflows, finding the bottlenecks. You get a prioritized action plan, not a 50-page report.
I design the system you need: process flows, governance rules, metrics that matter. Everything is documented, everything has an owner.
I implement with weekly checkpoints and real progress updates. Your team works alongside me, so they own the system from day one.
Full documentation, trained team, measurable success criteria. Your system runs without me. Optional support if you need to iterate.

trova.title: Trova
trova.tagline: The SaaS boilerplate that actually ships.
trova.description: Stop rebuilding auth, emails, billing, and i18n for every project. Trova gives you a production-ready foundation so you can focus on what makes your SaaS unique.

features.auth: Better Auth — magic links, OAuth (Google, GitHub), 2FA, session management
features.email: Resend + React Email — transactional emails, 5 templates included
features.i18n: next-intl — English and Italian out of the box, easy to extend
features.ui: shadcn/ui + Tailwind v4 — dark mode, responsive, customizable

about.title: About Riccardo
about.subtitle: Operations & Delivery. PMP®. From retail to Head of Operations — with measurable results along the way.
about.intro: Senior Delivery Manager & Head of Operations (PMP®). 7+ years making teams faster and less chaotic. Enterprise portfolio €500K+, teams of 8-12, 40% faster time-to-market. Started in retail, moved through Accenture, led operations at Ciao Elsa. PMP® certified. Now looking for the next challenge — if your team needs operational order, let's talk.
story: My career started in retail management — In’s Mercato, Aldi, Terranova. I learned operations the hard way: managing inventory, scheduling shifts, coaching teams, explaining to the regional manager why we missed target. It was the best possible training for delivery management, even if I didn’t know it yet.

Then Accenture. I built enterprise applications (SAP UI5, JavaScript) and automated processes that had been manual for years: +30% efficiency, -15% administrative errors, -20% response times. It was the first time I saw that the right process beats raw talent — every time.

At Esse Solutions I owned a €500K portfolio of digital projects, coordinating distributed teams of 8-12 across B2B eCommerce (Magento, Shopware) and PIM/DAM (Pimcore). I introduced structured Agile where there was none: productivity went up 25%, time-to-market dropped 40%, completion times shrank 20%.

At Ciao Elsa I was Head of Operations for 8 weeks — by design. The startup needed an operations function from scratch: processes, KPIs, team structure, governance. I built it, handed it over, and left. A short engagement that proved the approach works even at startup speed.

I'm currently in transition — my Ciao Elsa engagement has concluded and I'm open to new opportunities. I bring a strong track record: operational architectures built in both enterprise and startup environments, PMP® certification, and the conviction that the right process beats raw talent — every time. In the meantime, I build tools (Trova, VulnClaw) because you can't design good systems if you've never built anything.
about.philosophy: Most companies don't fail because they lack talent or ideas. They fail because their operations can't handle the weight of their own growth. I build the operating system that fixes that — combining the rigor of PMP® with the speed of someone who's been in the trenches. No jargon. No theater. Just systems that work.
about.ctaDesc: Have a project, idea, or just want to chat? I'm always open to interesting conversations.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Riccardo Bozzato (“I”, “me”, “my”) collects, uses, and protects your personal data when you visit my website, download resources, or engage my consulting services. I take your privacy seriously — I follow GDPR and keep data collection to the minimum necessary.

sections.title: 2. Data I Collect
sections.content:
Contact form: name, email address, and message you submit voluntarily.
Freebie downloads (playbook): name and email address — used to deliver the PDF and send the email sequence (max 6 emails over 30 days).
Consulting inquiries: name, email, company, and project details you share — used to prepare proposals and deliver services.
Analytics: anonymous, aggregated page views. No cookies, no personal tracking, no fingerprinting.

sections.title: 3. How I Use Your Data
sections.content:
To respond to your inquiries and prepare proposals.
To deliver free resources (playbook PDF) and the associated email sequence.
To communicate about active consulting engagements.
To improve my website based on anonymous usage patterns.
I do not sell, rent, trade, or share your personal data with any third party for their marketing purposes.

sections.title: 4. Email Marketing (Consent & Unsubscribe)
sections.content: When you download the free playbook, you consent to receive a 6-email educational sequence over approximately 30 days. Each email includes an unsubscribe link. You can withdraw consent at any time — your request is processed immediately and you will receive no further emails. Unsubscribing does not affect communications related to active consulting engagements.

sections.title: 5. Legal Basis (GDPR)
sections.content:
I process your data based on:
Consent: when you submit a form (contact, freebie download). You can withdraw at any time.
Contractual necessity: when you engage my consulting services — data processing is required to deliver the agreed work.
Legitimate interest: responding to pre-sales inquiries and improving my services.

sections.title: 6. Data Retention
sections.content:
Contact form inquiries: deleted after 12 months of inactivity.
Freebie subscribers: retained until you unsubscribe (plus 30 days grace for re-engagement).
Consulting client data: retained for the duration of the engagement plus 24 months for tax/legal compliance (as required by Italian law).
You can request deletion of your data at any time by emailing riccardobozzato@gmail.com.

sections.title: 7. Your Rights (GDPR)
sections.content:
You have the right to:
Access your data — request a copy of everything I hold about you.
Rectify inaccurate data — ask me to correct or complete your information.
Delete your data — request erasure (subject to legal retention requirements).
Restrict processing — limit how I use your data.
Data portability — receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format.
Withdraw consent — at any time, for any processing based on consent.
To exercise any of these rights, email riccardobozzato@gmail.com. I will respond within 30 days.

sections.title: 8. Third-Party Processors
sections.content:
I use the following third-party services to operate this site and deliver services. Each has been vetted for GDPR compliance:

Resend (resend.com) — transactional email delivery and email sequence automation. Privacy: resend.com/privacy
Netlify (netlify.com) — website hosting and CDN. Privacy: netlify.com/privacy
GitHub (github.com) — source code hosting and project management. Privacy: github.com/privacy
Stripe (stripe.com) — payment processing for Trova purchases. Privacy: stripe.com/privacy
Iubenda (iubenda.com) — privacy policy generation and consent management. Privacy: iubenda.com/privacy

Data is processed within the EU and US (under SCC agreements).

sections.title: 9. Data Security
sections.content: I implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data: encrypted connections (HTTPS), access controls on databases, minimal data collection principle, and regular security reviews. No data transmission over the internet is 100% secure, but I follow industry best practices to minimize risk.

sections.title: 10. Changes to This Policy
sections.content: I may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be communicated via email (if I have your contact for active services) or via a notice on this website. The “Last updated” date at the top of this page reflects the most recent revision.

sections.title: 11. Contact
sections.content:
For any questions, requests, or concerns about this privacy policy or how I handle your data:

Riccardo Bozzato
Legnaro, PD, Italy
Email: riccardobozzato@gmail.com
Phone: +39 389 213 9542

You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Italian Data Protection Authority (Garante per la Protezione dei Dati Personali) at garanteprivacy.it.
